Our Campus
2013 Established
About Our School

Where Tradition Meets Modern Education

Gurukul Public School, Haridaspur is a most coveted project of the SAI Learning Trust, started in 2013. It is an English Medium Day-Boarding cum Residential School for boys and girls, Nursery to Class XII, affiliated to the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE), New Delhi.

Spread across a well-planned 3-acre campus in Haridaspur (Chandikhol, Jajpur), the school boasts very good academic standards with praiseworthy results in CBSE Secondary and Senior Secondary examinations. Our boarders hail from different states across India, creating a rich, diverse environment.

The school is an epitome of the "Guru-Shishya" tradition — reminiscent of the old Gurukul system — imbued with the most advanced technology and modern teaching methods.

🎯 Our Vision

To mould and reshape young minds through ethical, social and moral values, helping them bloom into responsible global citizens.

🚀 Our Mission

To strive relentlessly by making the best use of quality infrastructure, resources and an experienced, talented, committed faculty.

💬 Have Questions? Chat With Us on WhatsApp

Get instant answers about admissions, fees, classes or our campus. Our counsellor typically replies within 15 minutes during school hours.

Our Leadership

Meet the People Behind GPS

Manager
Shree Abhaya Kumar Jena
Manager · Gurukul Public School · SAI Learning Trust

Education is the foundation on which strong, ethical, and capable future citizens are built. At Gurukul Public School, we have created a space where children grow in knowledge, character, and confidence — supported by dedicated teachers and world-class infrastructure on our 3-acre Haridaspur campus.

Principal
Mr. Suryanarayan Mohanty
Principal · Gurukul Public School, Jajpur

As Principal, I feel honoured to be part of an institution where every stakeholder is a learner and every day is an opportunity to discover. We are a community of learners — students, educators, parents and staff — committed to high standards in academics, co-curricular participation and responsible citizenship. It is the contribution of our students that makes Gurukul Public School an exceptional learning community, upholding the legacy of the Sai Education Trust.

Why Choose Us
Why Choose Gurukul Public School?

What makes GPS the preferred CBSE school in Jajpur, Chandikhol and surrounding areas

🏫
CBSE Affiliated
Affiliated to the Central Board of Secondary Education, New Delhi (Affiliation No. 1530241) — a nationally recognised, structured, child-centred curriculum.
👩‍🏫
Experienced Faculty
A confluence of the best teachers with proven track records — caring, trained and dedicated to nurturing every child's unique potential.
❄️
AC Smart Classrooms
Fully air-conditioned, well-illuminated classrooms equipped with projectors and recording facilities for modern teaching.
💻
Modern Technology
State-of-the-art educational technology ensures strong content absorption and consistently high student performance.
📊
Continuous Assessment
A fascinating education platform with continuous feedback and assessment — students learn better, teachers deliver more effectively.
🏠
Day-Boarding + Hostel
Both day-boarding and residential options available — a home away from home for students from across India.
🎨
Holistic Development
Art, music, yoga, sports and co-curricular activities woven into everyday school life for all-round personality growth.
🌳
3-Acre Green Campus
A spacious, green, open campus with safe playgrounds, gardens and a calm environment ideal for learning and growing.
🚌
Safe Transport
GPS-equipped bus service with trained drivers and attendants covering Jajpur, Cuttack and nearby towns.

Infrastructure
Our Facilities

Everything a modern learner needs — all on one campus

Our Campus
AC Smart Classrooms
Fully air-conditioned, well-illuminated classrooms equipped with interactive smart boards and modern teaching technology.
Our Campus
Well-Stocked Library
Thousands of books, journals and reference materials encouraging a lifelong love for reading and independent study.
Our Campus
Computer Lab
Modern computer lab with individual workstations for digital literacy, coding and IT fundamentals from an early age.
Chemistry Lab
Science Laboratories
Fully equipped Physics, Chemistry and Biology laboratories for hands-on experimentation and practical learning.
Our Fleet
School Bus & Safe Transport
Dedicated GPS school buses with trained drivers and attendants covering Jajpur, Chandikhol, Cuttack and nearby routes.
Sports Day
Sports & Playground
Spacious playgrounds for volleyball, cricket, football and inter-house sports — building teamwork and fitness.
Art Class
Arts & Crafts
Dedicated art spaces for painting, craft and creative expression — nurturing imagination alongside academic excellence.
Campus Mess
Mess & Dining Hall
Clean, hygienic mess with nutritious meals prepared fresh daily — balanced food plans approved by dieticians.
Our Gym
Gymnasium
Fitness and strength-training facility with age-appropriate equipment and supervised sessions for all-round development.
Campus Security
24×7 CCTV Security
Campus-wide CCTV surveillance, trained security staff and strict child-safety protocols — your child's safety first.

Discipline · Teamwork · Excellence

Where Every Student Learns to Rise Together

At GPS, academic rigour meets character building. Our students participate in inter-house competitions, yoga, gymnastics, drama, debates, and community service — learning the values of discipline, leadership and teamwork every single day.

4
School Houses
15+
Annual Events
Daily
Sports & Yoga
Boarding & Residential
Day-Boarding + Residential Options

A Day-Boarding cum Residential School — local families can send their children daily, while students from distant places stay on campus. Our boarders come from different states across India.

🛏️
Comfortable Hostels
Separate, secure boys' and girls' accommodation with trained wardens.
🍽️
Nutritious Meals
Three wholesome meals and snacks prepared in a hygienic kitchen.
👨‍⚕️
Medical Support
24×7 healthcare assistance and regular health check-ups for all boarders.
📖
Supervised Study
Evening study hours with subject teachers to help with doubts and homework.

Process
Admissions Process — 4 Simple Steps
1
Submit Enquiry Form
Fill out the form above or send us a WhatsApp message. Our admissions counsellor will contact you within 24 hours.
2
Campus Visit & Counselling
Visit our 3-acre campus, meet our teachers, see the classrooms, labs and hostel — completely free of cost.
3
Submit Application with Documents
Within 3 days of visit
Birth Certificate, Aadhaar Card, Passport-size photos, and previous report card (if applicable).
4
Confirm Your Seat 🎉
Same day / Next day
Pay admission fees (with Early Bird discount!) and secure your child's seat for Session 2026–27.
